docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,785.00 FILED BY FOY, ANDREW M. AS TO DEFENDANT COWAN, KENNETH PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOY, ANDREW M.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF FOY, ANDREW M.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ANDREW M. FOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENNETH PAUL COWAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOY, ANDREW M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COWAN, KENNETH PAUL DEFENDANT SHALL PAY NOTHING. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
